name: @overdraw/plugin-hotkey-default
description: Bundled hotkey plugin: parses the user's hotkey config (KeyboardConfig), defines sub-modes on the seat's binding chain, and registers each binding via sdk.input.bind. Handlers dispatch to actions, push/pop modes, or no-op per the binding spec. Ships with overdraw and registers in the 'hotkey' namespace at priority 0 (the floor of the priority chain).
